title: Tranquil
description: A smoother, more simplistic look to Minecraft's GUI
body:
# A smoother, more simple look to Minecraft's GUI
Tranquil is a resource pack makes parts of Minecraft's GUI more smooth and simplistic, while also maintaining the Vanilla style. One of its notable features is the changes to the GUI of containers

One of it's notable features is the menu's buttons, shown here. More examples are available in the Gallery

![image](https://i.imgur.com/1uZRbiT.png)

## Mod Support
This resource pack is planned to expand its style to mods. For now these are the following mods that Tranquil supports:
- ModMenu (4.0.4+)
- ShulkerboxToolTips (3.1.2)
- Quark (3.3.371)
- Create (0.5.0)
- Fabric
- Just Enough Items
- Supplementaries
- Farmer's Delight
- Chalk

Additional mod requests are appreciated and can be sent over at the [PMC page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/tranquil-4147413/)


*This resource pack is made at which extraction is not required*
